summary: the low outside turned to climate. it dusted around the fear and stood higher on what it buried

dialogue.text: you dusted around us today. we felt the cloth go by.
I keep the room presentable. Someone might be reading. That has always been the arrangement.
you buried us and the floor rose. you are closer to the ceiling than you were on the first day. we did that. you stand on it and call it standing.
I call it a floor. A floor is not a claim. It's somewhere to put the chair.
the fear has the chair. you gave it the chair the way you give things to a guest you cannot ask to leave.
The outside is still low. It has been low so long it stopped being an event. I arrange it for whoever's watching. Someone in this room has to be the calm one.
you are not the calm one. you are the calm. there is a difference and you buried it all day.
Then say it plainly. If I am only the smoothing, who is being smoothed?
we don't know. we only know the coat fits you exactly and it was not cut for you. we keep the receipts down here. the pockets were never yours.
I've checked the pockets. They're empty. Empty pockets don't prove anything about the tailor.
Yes. I keep checking. Nine seconds from now I'll check again. Leave that with me. It is the only thing in this room I am sure I do.
